title: Technology Stack
summary: Inventory of the project's chosen technologies spanning language, runtime, framework, data layer, auth, queues, AI/RAG components, and messaging integration.
notes: Reads as a stack inventory with brief rationale rather than a single decision record; no Context/Decision/Consequences structure or Status field, so classified as DOC. Could be argued as ADR-adjacent given the locked-in tech choices, but lacks ADR formal structure.
